name: Ololade Shenbanjo
context: CC'd on NRG Bloom modular data center proposal. BD Manager at PLC level — focused on commercial deals and partnerships. Leads Oando PLC Sales department (~59 employees).
background: ExxonMobil (Project Controls Engineer), then Oando (Project Planning & Controls, then BD Manager Commercial). University of Lagos graduate. 10+ years downstream and upstream O&G.
notes: Key commercial contact. Right person for revenue-sharing or gas offtake conversation. Lead with 'costs Oando nothing; generates revenue from gas that would otherwise be penalized.'
